Notice Of Motion And Motion To Name Al Giddings As Doe Two
Off Calendar Feb-16-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, James P. Green of the law offices of James Paul Green (415.664.9119) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The cause is argued and submitted by the moving party as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court vacates the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF DEMAKAS PLUMBING & HEATING INC.'S Motion To Name Al Giddings As Doe Two is GRANTED based on representations made in open court, by counsel for the plaitniff. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
